column1: # Official UUID test vectors from RFC 9562 (Universally Unique IDentifiers), Appendix A "Test Vectors".
# The UUIDv8 row is the illustrative example from Appendix B.1 (Figure 27).
# These are the canonical "final" values from the RFC. For UuidRfc9562Bytes (network byte order,
# RFC 9562 sec. 4), the 16-byte big-endian encoding is exactly the canonical hex with dashes removed
# (third column), so this doubles as the byte-layout vector.
